name: cinebook-api
description: Production-grade movie ticket booking system — microservices with Node.js, Kafka, RabbitMQ, MongoDB, Redis

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GW,USER,SHOW,BOOK,PAY,NOTIF" --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgRed" "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/show-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/booking-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/payment-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service"
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix services/api-gateway && npm i --prefix services/user-service && npm i --prefix services/show-service && npm i --prefix services/booking-service && npm i --prefix services/payment-service && npm i --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix services/api-gateway && npm run build --prefix services/user-service && npm run build --prefix services/show-service && npm run build --prefix services/booking-service && npm run build --prefix services/payment-service && npm run build --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.test:all: npm test --prefix services/user-service && npm test --prefix services/booking-service && npm test --prefix services/show-service && npm test --prefix services/payment-service && npm test --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.health: concurrently "curl -s http://localhost:3000/health | jq ." "curl -s http://localhost:3001/health | jq ." "curl -s http://localhost:3002/health | jq ." "curl -s http://localhost:3003/health | jq ." "curl -s http://localhost:3004/health | jq ."
scripts.clean: rm -rf services/api-gateway/dist services/user-service/dist services/show-service/dist services/booking-service/dist services/payment-service/dist services/notification-service/dist
